title: Nefteyugansk Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Nefteyugansk with a Z-Score of -5.94. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 21.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 78%, and the wind speed is moderate at 11.6 km/h. 
 The Cold Degree Days (CDD) is 0.0 GG, indicating no heat-related concerns.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of this extreme cold snap.
